response.justification: Bogdan brings 18+ years of full-stack experience with direct TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS usage across multiple production roles, and his current work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks is a precise match for the role's AI agent development requirement and enterprise tooling focus. His testing culture is deeply embedded — he authored test tooling in D-lang, ran TDD dojos, and applied strict TDD/pairing/CI practices at RIDE Capital. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js (the primary backend framework), no mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright in the JS ecosystem, and neither Kotlin nor Python appears in his skills despite both being listed as required proficiencies.
strengths: 18+ years of full-stack depth with hands-on TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes across multiple production environments
Current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) directly maps to the role's AI agent development requirement
Demonstrated testing culture: authored Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner, organized public TDD workshops, and applied strict TDD/CI/trunk-based development at RIDE Capital
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the primary backend framework for this role
Jest, Vitest, and Playwright are all absent from the skill set; testing experience is proven but not in the required JS/TS testing ecosystem
Kotlin and Python are listed as required proficiencies but neither appears in employment history or the skills section

key_factors.factor: Active AI agent and MCP framework work
